# keychainItems

**Instance Property**

The keychain items associated with this token.

## Declaration

```swift
var keychainItems: [TKTokenKeychainItem] { get set }
```

## Retrieving Keys and Certificates

- **certificate(for:)**: Returns a certificate from the keychain with the object identifier you specify.
- **key(for:)**: Returns a key from the keychain with the object identifier you specify.

items.description: Returns a certificate from the keychain with the object identifier you specify.
items.name: certificate(for:)

items.description: Returns a key from the keychain with the object identifier you specify.
items.name: key(for:)
